conflict: Security response, timed coordination across cars, and the need to force civic visibility before management can reseal the scene.
consequence: The Meridian West line is publicly broken when sewage, testimony, paperwork, and municipal jurisdiction collide in full view.
must_land_beats: Synchronize worker sabotage, detainee refusal, and evidentiary release.
Keep the action grounded in rail systems and human bodies rather than action-movie spectacle.
Make the greywater purge and public platform legally consequential.
Ensure every main accomplice pays an immediate price.
